posts.author: aabceedee (Alfredo Callo III)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we recently need to create an API call/action.

Main problem that we encounter is the ID of every object (Folder, Sub-folder, Item, Sub-item, Template). We are trying to find this on from the URL but it’s not there, or anywhere around the workspace.

Solution: Is to activate the ‘Developer Mode’.

How-to: Turn-on your developer mode.
First, you will need to click the top-right corner (profile icon).
Second, select the ‘monday.labs’.

image456×537 26.2 KB

After this, just search the word ‘Developer Mode’ and activate it.
image705×254 16.5 KB

Once this has been activated, you can now close the popup page and the whole page will automatically refresh and now can view the Folder IDs and alike to use on your API calls or Automations.

Hope this helps.
